name: Ivory Thorn Rose
shortDescription: A pale rose arrangement with black foliage and restrained thorn-like texture.
description: The Ivory Thorn Rose is a signature entry product for the public catalogue. It keeps the flower-shop purpose clear while setting a sharper tone than a conventional gift bouquet.

name: Crimson Oath Roses
shortDescription: Deep red roses arranged with dark greenery and a dramatic finish.
description: Crimson Oath Roses gives the catalogue a familiar commercial product while matching the Black Thorn palette.

name: Black Calla Study
shortDescription: A sculptural calla lily arrangement with a minimal, high-contrast profile.
description: Black Calla Study is a premium public product that feels more editorial than traditional.

name: Moonlit Orchid
shortDescription: A white orchid plant presented in a dark ceramic pot.
description: Moonlit Orchid gives the catalogue a potted plant product that is giftable, recognisable, and easy to stock.

name: Raven ZZ Plant
shortDescription: A dark-leaf indoor plant with a simple premium presentation.
description: Raven ZZ Plant adds a practical indoor plant to the catalogue.

name: Dusk Dried Botanicals
shortDescription: A preserved arrangement using dried grasses, seed pods, and dark tonal stems.
description: Dusk Dried Botanicals supports non-fresh inventory and longer shelf-life products.

name: Pale Remembrance Spray
shortDescription: A restrained sympathy arrangement using pale flowers and dark foliage.
description: Pale Remembrance Spray is a serious occasion product that suits the darker premium tone without becoming gimmicky.

name: Thorn Vessel
shortDescription: A black ceramic vase designed as an add-on or standalone product.
description: Thorn Vessel adds florist-adjacent merchandise without becoming a bundle or subscription.

name: Sealed Rose Relic
shortDescription: A preserved cream rose displayed in a dark glass dome with aged-gold detail.
description: Sealed Rose Relic is a restricted or premium catalogue item that gives the system a reason to support visibility controls.

name: Nocturne Orchid Centrepiece
shortDescription: A premium orchid and dark foliage centrepiece for high-value orders.
description: Nocturne Orchid Centrepiece supports the idea of a private catalogue while staying believable as a premium florist product.

name: Black Ribbon Message Set
shortDescription: A set of premium message cards with dark ribbon and wax-seal-inspired presentation.
description: Black Ribbon Message Set gives the catalogue a low-cost add-on style product.

name: Night Garden Candle
shortDescription: A dark botanical candle designed for gift orders and premium presentation.
description: Night Garden Candle is a florist-adjacent gift item that fits the brand direction.
